Hi. I’m Garrett Swann, Santa Barbara native, a now New Yorker, full time realist best expressed via Memoji, a gym rat, Cookie Dough Ice Cream addict, a go-getter and an eternal optimist. Obsessed with great convos over my homemade Carrot Cake (Mom’s recipe), I spend my days influencing the younger generations with my personal style, poise and panache. A role model (pun intended), I’ve Globe-trotted as a model and influencer in campaigns around Mother Earth. There’s a list, but I’d just be name dropping. A couple of years ago, I received a clever comment on a post from Bennett Chin, stalked his IG, slide into’s DMs and found my guy. We were married a year later. Now that I’m wedded dude, I decided to evolve my social media platform including my IGTV production UNDERCOVERS, interviewing celebrities & people I am fascinated I’m with “in bed.” I am also the Co-Founder/CMO of a start-up mens apparel brand called ALPHX in New York City, former star of several TV shows (Fashion House, Unusually Thicke) and questionable indie films (The Casserole Club) and my motto in life is “have swimsuit, will travel.” XO

[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65af5bb45119ef8315f7474c/67487bbed9093ede5b8ccb0a_default-profile-picture.svg)![Chas Greener](https://social-data-media.popularpays.com/6iX5KChp2vK1aitDpR89uyza)](https://popularpays.com/platform/discover/influencer-profile/chas-greener)

Fort Collins
,
United States
,
Colorado
Hi, I’m Chas and I’m so excited to meet you! My website is about what I repurpose, upcycle, craft, organize, clean, hack, and oh so much more! It’s about doing things we love – teaching, learning, sharing, crafting, organizing, inspiring, helping, collaborating, supporting, and building a community… a family! I’m a breast cancer survivor, and have gone through 2 hips surgeries. I share all my tips, tricks, and things I’ve learned on my journey. Chemical free cleaning, tips on reducing stress, being mindful, and easy recipes are just a few things you’ll see. How do you learn best? Written instructions, pictures, videos? I have taught for over 30 years and I have several learning styles here for you! I love creating tutorial projects and videos for you! I’ve worked with companies like Plaid Enterprises, Wagner, Dixie Belle Paint, Hometalk, Worx, Fusion Mineral Paint, Main Street Creations, and more. You can see many of my videos I’ve done with Hometalk that have millions of views, as well as Live videos, and as a host on Hometalk TV. I a presenter at Haven Conference and just love teaching, sharing, and getting to know you! A little bit about me… I grew up in Minnesota and my family moved to Colorado when I was 14. I went to Colorado State University (Go Rams!) where I had a band and dance scholarship, graduated with a Bachelor of the Arts, emphasis in Dance, and met my husband. I retired from being a dance Teacher, & former dance artistic, program, and company director of Mountain Kids (24 years)! I have 2 amazing kids, I’m a little kooky, a kid at heart, and I’m the typo queen (sorry about that part in advance). I love spending time with family and friends, watching movies, spending time outside, and getting back to the simple life.
[View profile](https://popularpays.com/platform/discover/influencer-profile/chas-greener)

Carla Kemp is a 57-year-old Influencer from Los Angeles, CA. Her mission is body positivity, the improvement of one’s health and to inspire women of all ages to practice self-love and to embrace their unique beauty. She is known on social media as __________. Carla shares her day-to-day fitness and nutrition routines with her 40k followers, as well as embracing her motto of living life to it’s fullest. She believes that every woman should be Fabulous and Fit. Mother of one, Carla likes to lead by example with her daughter and her followers, by taking pride in herself in all stages of life. Carla has a degree in Fashion and Merchandising and was a professional Model for over two decades. Her lifetime passion for health & wellness also led her to work in the fitness industry for many years. She decided to reenter the modeling world in her 50’s as a “Silver Fox” Model, and has been proudly showcasing her salt & pepper locks. She has most recently been featured in commercials for Target and Skechers. As an influencer, and an ambassador for fashion, beauty and wellness brands, Carla has maintained her love for health, and continues to inspire droves of women to practice self-love at every age.
